page_content:
MUSC463 Technology and a Career in Music (3 Credits)

A hands-on introduction to technology as it applies to music creation

and recording. Digital audio workstations, music notation software, and cloud-based music technology are used to create and manipulate musical examples with an eye toward their practical applications for professional musicians.

Recommended: Ability to read music on a grand staff (treble and bass clef).

Additional Information: No previous experience with technology is required.
